title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 39.
content:
There was an Old Person of Philae,
    Whose conduct was scroobious and wily;
    He rushed up a Palm,
    When the weather was calm,
    And observed all the ruins of Philae.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 39."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
